chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Constitutional Petition No.S-195 of 2025 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Petitioner: Muneer Ahmed s/o Muhammad Usman through Mr.Zubair Ahmed Khuhawar, Advocate Respondent: Mst.Nasreen Shaikh d/o Sardar. Nemo. Date of hearing: 23.10.2025 Date of decision: 11.11.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J: For reasons to be recorded, the above-titled petition is dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
